Validation Rule: Age must be between 18 and 80 years
Height must be between 100 and 250 cm
Weight must be between 30 and 250 kg
Diagnosis Date cannot be a future date
Medication Dose must be greater than zero
Adverse Event Term cannot be blank
Adverse Event Outcome cannot be blank
AE End Date must be on or after AE Start Date
Glucose result must be within acceptable range
Systolic BP must be within physiological range
Diastolic BP must be within physiological range
Pulse Rate must be within physiological range
